description: Anti-fabrication: when asked where to sign up, the reply reuses the KB URL verbatim and invents no other link.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

kb_context: To become a volunteer, complete the interest form at https://helpinghands.example/volunteer. After you submit it, our coordinator reaches out within three business days to schedule an orientation. We do not accept walk-in volunteer applications.

conversation_history.content: Wonderful! We'd love to have you. Volunteers start by sharing a bit about their interests.

user_input: Where do I sign up online?
